overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked futuristic city street at night. The scene features vibrant neon advertisements, palm-lined sidewalks, and modern glass architecture typical of Night City's commercial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the Eden Plaza building overhang, passing palm trees and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in red top walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large curved commercial building with massive digital billboards displaying advertisements
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in square planters with yellow trim
large illuminated screens showing various advertisements including 'Eden Plaza' signage
futuristic yellow safety railings separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath the Eden Plaza building, with tall palm trees lining the left side and massive digital billboards illuminating the right. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights as the character passes a pedestrian in red walking the opposite direction.

events.description: character in blue jacket who was walking ahead turns and walks past the camera to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing standalone advertisement kiosks and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in blue jacket and shorts walking ahead, then passing by on the right

entered.detail: standalone digital advertisement display showing 'DARRA' and other rotating ads
tall skyscraper with illuminated glass facade visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past standalone advertisement kiosks displaying 'DARRA' and other brands, while a pedestrian in a blue jacket walks ahead and then passes by. The Eden Plaza building remains prominent on the right as modern glass skyscrapers become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with modern commercial buildings

events.description: crosses the street and enters a more open plaza area with different building architecture
lighting shifts to dominant green neon as the character approaches a building with green illuminated facade

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning left into an open plaza area, passing by benches and palm trees

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent green neon lighting and '3 HOURS THESE' signage
modern concrete benches lining the plaza walkway
zebra crossing with white stripes on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street into a more open plaza, transitioning from the covered walkway to an exposed area with modern glass buildings. The lighting shifts to prominent green neon as the character passes benches and palm trees in the center of the plaza, heading toward a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit plaza intersection with heavy reflections

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant pink and purple neon as the character enters a different zone of the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the plaza intersection and turning right to head back toward the original street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and white outfit crossing the plaza in the opposite direction

entered.detail: bright orange safety railings marking the edge of the plaza
futuristic traffic signal structures with illuminated poles

segments.scene_description: The character crosses through a plaza intersection bathed in vibrant pink and purple neon light reflecting off the wet pavement. After crossing, the character turns right, heading back toward the Eden Plaza building visible in the distance, passing orange railings and futuristic traffic light structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked commercial district that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into a wide, neon-drenched open plaza. It begins beneath the cover of the Eden Plaza building, moving past towering palm trees and massive digital billboards that cast vibrant reflections onto the wet pavement. As the character passes standalone advertisement kiosks and other pedestrians, the scene opens up to reveal distant glass skyscrapers. The camera then shifts from the covered walkway into an exposed plaza area where the lighting turns a prominent green among central benches and palms. Finally, the movement carries the character through a crosswalk bathed in pink and purple neon before turning right toward the distant Eden Plaza building past orange railings and futuristic traffic structures.
